# BrainSAIT Product Catalog

## Product Ecosystem Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              BRAINSAIT PRODUCT ECOSYSTEM                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌──────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────┐
│  HEALTH LINC     │  │  BUSINESS LINC   │  │  PERSONAL LINC   │
│  Suite           │  │  Suite           │  │  Suite           │
└──────────────────┘  └──────────────────┘  └──────────────────┘
        │                     │                      │
        └─────────────────────┴──────────────────────┘
                              │
                    ┌─────────▼─────────┐
                    │   MASTERLINC      │
                    │   Orchestrator    │
                    └───────────────────┘
```

---

## Health Linc Suite

### ClaimLinc
**Intelligent Claims Management**

**Features**:
- Pre-submission FHIR validation
- Rejection analysis and interpretation
- Financial impact calculation
- Resubmission automation
- Batch claim processing
- Real-time payer integration

**Pricing**: Starting at $1,500/month

**Target Users**:
- Hospitals
- Clinics
- Billing companies
- RCM departments

---

### PolicyLinc
**Payer Policy Intelligence**

**Features**:
- Policy document analysis
- Coverage rule extraction
- Prior authorization automation
- Benefit verification
- Policy change alerts
- Multi-payer support

**Pricing**: Starting at $800/month

**Target Users**:
- Healthcare providers
- Insurance companies
- Medical billing specialists

---

### DocsLinc
**Medical Document Processing**

**Features**:
- Clinical note extraction
- Prescription digitization
- Lab report parsing
- Radiology report analysis
- FHIR resource generation
- Bilingual document support

**Pricing**: Starting at $600/month

**Target Users**:
- Hospitals
- Clinics
- Medical records departments
- Telemedicine platforms

---

### RadioLinc
**Diagnostic Imaging AI**

**Features**:
- X-ray interpretation
- CT scan analysis
- MRI review
- Abnormality detection
- Triage prioritization
- Report generation

**Pricing**: Starting at $2,000/month

**Target Users**:
- Radiology departments
- Emergency departments
- Diagnostic centers
- Teleradiology services

---

### Voice2Care
**Patient Interaction Automation**

**Features**:
- 24/7 voice assistant
- Appointment scheduling
- Symptom assessment
- Medication reminders
- Bilingual support (AR/EN)
- EMR integration

**Pricing**: Starting at $500/month

**Target Users**:
- Hospitals
- Clinics
- Call centers
- Telemedicine platforms

---

## Business Linc Suite

### ProcessLinc
**Workflow Automation**

**Features**:
- Process mapping
- Automation design
- Task orchestration
- Integration management
- Performance analytics
- Compliance tracking

**Pricing**: Starting at $400/month

**Target Users**:
- SMEs
- Enterprises
- Government entities
- Startups

---

### DataLinc
**Data Intelligence Platform**

**Features**:
- Data extraction
- ETL pipelines
- Analytics dashboards
- Predictive modeling
- Report generation
- API integration

**Pricing**: Starting at $600/month

**Target Users**:
- Business analysts
- Data teams
- Decision makers
- Operations managers

---

### SecLinc
**Security & Compliance**

**Features**:
- PDPL compliance automation
- Access control management
- Audit logging
- Threat detection
- Incident response
- Compliance reporting

**Pricing**: Starting at $800/month

**Target Users**:
- IT security teams
- Compliance officers
- Risk managers
- CISOs

---

## Platform Products

### HealthSync (iOS App)
**Personal Health Management**

**Features**:
- Health record aggregation
- Appointment management
- Medication tracking
- Lab result viewing
- Insurance card storage
- Family health management

**Pricing**: Free (Basic), $9.99/month (Premium)

**Target Users**:
- Patients
- Families
- Health-conscious individuals

---

### Efhm RAG System
**Enterprise Knowledge Management**

**Features**:
- Document indexing
- Semantic search
- Question answering
- Multi-source integration
- Bilingual support
- API access

**Pricing**: Starting at $1,200/month

**Target Users**:
- Enterprises
- Research institutions
- Legal firms
- Healthcare organizations

---

### Spark-Solo Apps
**Rapid Application Development**

**Features**:
- No-code app builder
- Pre-built templates
- AI-powered design
- Instant deployment
- Mobile-responsive
- Custom branding

**Pricing**: Starting at $200/month

**Target Users**:
- Entrepreneurs
- Small businesses
- Marketing teams
- Event organizers

---

## Infrastructure Products

### Coolify Deployment Mesh
**Self-Hosted Platform**

**Features**:
- Container orchestration
- Auto-scaling
- Load balancing
- SSL management
- Monitoring
- Backup automation

**Pricing**: Self-hosted (free), Managed ($500/month)

**Target Users**:
- DevOps teams
- IT departments
- Startups
- Tech companies

---

### Cloudflare Integration Suite
**Edge Computing & Security**

**Features**:
- Workers deployment
- D1 database
- R2 storage
- Zero Trust security
- CDN optimization
- DDoS protection

**Pricing**: Pay-as-you-go

**Target Users**:
- Web developers
- SaaS companies
- E-commerce platforms
- Media companies

---

## Bundles & Packages

### Healthcare Starter Bundle
**For Small Clinics**

**Includes**:
- ClaimLinc (Basic)
- PolicyLinc (Basic)
- Voice2Care (Basic)
- 5 user licenses
- Email support

**Price**: $2,500/month (Save 30%)

---

### Healthcare Enterprise Bundle
**For Hospitals**

**Includes**:
- ClaimLinc (Enterprise)
- PolicyLinc (Enterprise)
- DocsLinc (Enterprise)
- RadioLinc (Enterprise)
- Voice2Care (Enterprise)
- Unlimited users
- 24/7 support
- Dedicated account manager
- Custom integrations

**Price**: Custom pricing

---

### SME Automation Bundle
**For Small Businesses**

**Includes**:
- ProcessLinc (Standard)
- DataLinc (Standard)
- Spark-Solo Apps (5 apps)
- 10 user licenses
- Business hours support

**Price**: $1,000/month (Save 25%)

---

## Add-Ons & Services

### Professional Services

**Implementation**:
- System setup: $5,000-$20,000
- Data migration: $3,000-$15,000
- Custom integration: $10,000-$50,000
- Training: $1,000/day

**Consulting**:
- RCM optimization: $200/hour
- Process automation: $150/hour
- Technical architecture: $250/hour

**Support Tiers**:
- Basic: Email (included)
- Standard: Email + Chat ($200/month)
- Premium: 24/7 Phone + Priority ($500/month)
- Enterprise: Dedicated team (Custom)

---

## Licensing Models

### SaaS Subscription
- Monthly or annual billing
- Per-user or per-organization pricing
- Automatic updates
- Cloud-hosted
- 99.9% uptime SLA

### On-Premise License
- Perpetual license
- One-time fee + annual maintenance
- Self-hosted
- Custom SLA
- Source code access (Enterprise tier)

### API Access
- Pay-per-call
- Monthly quotas
- Volume discounts
- Developer sandbox (free)
- Production keys (paid)

---

## Free Tier

### Community Edition

**Includes**:
- ClaimLinc (10 claims/month)
- HealthSync (Basic features)
- Spark-Solo (1 app)
- Community support
- Documentation access

**Purpose**: 
- Evaluation
- Learning
- Small-scale usage
- Community building

---

## Roadmap

### Q1 2025
- Launch ClaimLinc v2.0
- Release PolicyLinc API
- Beta: RadioLinc

### Q2 2025
- Launch Business Linc Suite
- Mobile apps for all agents
- Agent Marketplace beta

### Q3 2025
- International expansion (UAE, Kuwait)
- Enterprise features
- Advanced analytics

### Q4 2025
- AI model customization
- White-label options
- Partner program launch

## Comparison Matrix

| Feature | Health Linc | Business Linc | Platform |
|---------|-------------|---------------|----------|
| Healthcare-specific | ✅ | ❌ | Partial |
| NPHIES integration | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| General automation | Partial | ✅ | ✅ |
| Mobile apps | ✅ | Partial | ✅ |
| Bilingual | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| API access | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| On-premise option | Enterprise | Enterprise | ✅ |
